Our Colon Cleanser is a dietary supplement designed to support and maintain digestive health. Formulated with a blend of natural ingredients, it helps promote regular bowel movements and ease digestive discomfort. This product combines the benefits of fiber, natural extracts, and digestive enzymes to gently cleanse the colon and support overall digestive function. Ideal for those seeking a natural way to maintain regularity and digestive balance, our Colon Cleanser provides an effective solution for a healthy digestive system.*


Ginger Root (Zingiber officinale Roscoe) extract promotes normal intestinal peristalsis due to the presence of gingerol. Psyllium Husk (Plantago ovata Forsk.) is rich in water-soluble fiber, excellent for stimulating the transit of intestinal masses. It does not irritate the intestines and has prebiotic properties, supporting a balanced and comfortable digestive system.*


Key Features:

• Promotes regular bowel movements

• Supports digestive health

• Maintains digestive comfort

• Contains a blend of natural ingredients including fiber and digestive enzymes

Our Dental Wipes are an easy alternative to brushing your dog's teeth! Just grab one pre-moistened wipe and gently clean your dog's teeth and gums. That's it - no water, no brush, no mess!

These wipes are pre-moistened with natural ingredients that help reduce plaque buildup, freshen your dog's breath and clean teeth and gum. They are flavored with Natural Banana Flavor, which dogs love!

Our wipes are pH balanced to match the natural pH of their saliva.

dog-ear-cleaner-wipes,Dog Ear Cleaner Wipes,"

Ear infections are the most common cause for vet visits - and most can be prevented by routinely cleaning your dog's ears - especially if he/she has floppy ears.


We developed an ideal solution for cleaning your dog's ears safely and easily. This product is made with natural ingredients, and has no alcohol, unlike most competitive offerings in the market. We harnessed the power of natural ingredients, such as Willow Bark and Witch Hazel, which gently moisturizes and exfoliates the skin around the ear canal to promote cell renewal. 


Easy to use, these wipes are pre-moistened with the cleaning solution - just grab one and clean your best friend's ears. It is a lot easier to use than regular, bottled cleaning solutions - and dogs are much more comfortable with it.


Our wipes are preserved with a natural preservative and is pH balanced. Plus, it smells great!

dog-waterless-shampoo,Dog Waterless Shampoo,"

Avoid the hassle of having to give your pup a full bath! With our dog waterless shampoo, you can clean your dog's fur easily, with no water. Just pump the foam onto your hands or directly onto your pup's fur, massage it well and wipe clean with a towel or just by brushing. 

Our Waterless Shampoo is made with effective deodorizing agents that help control and neutralize unpleasant odors. It is naturally scented with Lavender and Lemon oils, that besides smelling great, help keep bugs away from your best friend.

Our shampoo is made with a unique fragrance technology, that controls the release of the fragrance over time so your pup smells great for a longer period of time!


Ingredients: Water, Coco Glucoside, Zinc ricinoleate, sodium lauroyl sarcosinate, tetrahydroxypropyl ethylenediamine, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Polysorbate 80, Soyethyl Morpholinium Ethosulfate, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, C12-15 Pareth-12, Cellulose Gum, Ethylhexylglycerin, Hydroxypropylcellulose, PVP, Pectin, Phenoxyethanol, Polyvinyl Alcohol, Ethyhexylglycerin, Citrus Limon (Lemon) Peel Oil

Warning: Do not apply the product to your dog's eyes, ears or nose.

dog-eye-wipes,Dog Eye Wipes,"

Our dog eye wipes make it easy to clean around your dog's eyes to remove tear stains and debris. These wipes come pre-moistened, ready to use. They contain 100% Natural Ingredients, including moisturizing agents such as Aloe Vera, and calming actives, such as Witch Hazel. While gently cleaning the area, the product will also support hydration and leave the eye area feeling smoother.

Reward your pup with treats while or right after cleaning his/her eyes - this will make him/her eager to get their eyes cleaned!

Our Dog Eye Wipes is made with a Natural Preservative from the Whole Foods Acceptable Premium Preservative List.


Ingredients: Water, Witch Hazel Extract, Leuconostoc/Radish Root Ferment Filtrate, Coco Glucoside, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Chamomille Extract.

Warning: For external use only. Do not apply directly to the eyes. Seek veterinary advice if your dog's eyes are red, swollen, or irritated.

fermented-mushroom-blend,Fermented Mushroom Blend,"

Fermented Mushroom Blend is a premium product featuring six different types of organically grown, fermented mushrooms in their full-spectrum state. This blend is designed to provide maximum bioavailability, digestion, and absorption. Research has shown that a mixture of polysaccharides from several immunomodulating mushrooms can offer excellent support to the human immune system. The pre-digested, fermented organic mushrooms in this product offer a wide range of naturally occurring vitamins, minerals, and immunomodulating polysaccharides.*

Scientific research has also revealed that the mushroom’s immune-supporting polysaccharides are found within the cell walls of chitin, an indigestible fiber. To release its nutritional payload, chitin must be cooked, hot water extracted or fermented. Our Fermented Mushroom Blend features mushrooms that have been micro-cultured through a unique probiotic fermentation process, aiding in digestion and allowing the beneficial immune support compounds, such as polysaccharides, to be easily digested and immediately absorbed in their most bioavailable form and at their peak activity.*
